metadata.title: Open Mock | Chat, AI, Social, and Email Mockup Generator
metadata.description: Open-source mockup generator for fake chat screenshots, social posts, AI chats, stories, and emails. Free, no signup required.

footer.tagline: Open-source mockup generator for educational and demo purposes. Not affiliated with any platform shown.

home.heroDescription: Create realistic fake screenshots for 49 platforms. Free, open source, runs entirely in your browser. No signup, no watermarks.
home.step1Description: Pick from 49 chat, AI, social, story, and email generators.
home.step2Description: Edit messages, names, timestamps, dark mode, and device frames.
home.step3Description: Download high-res PNG or animated video. No watermarks.

docs.metadataDescription: Install, run, and self-host Open Mock locally.
docs.title: Documentation
docs.vercelDescription: Connect your GitHub repo to Vercel. Next.js is auto-detected. No environment variables required.
docs.exportStep1: Click Export on any generator page
docs.exportStep2: Choose resolution: 1x, 2x, or 3x for high-DPI screens
docs.exportStep4: Video export available for chat and AI generators
docs.contributingDescriptionSuffix: in the repository for how to add a new platform generator.

faq.metadataDescription: Frequently asked questions about the Open Mock mockup generator.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.introPrefix: Quick answers about Open Mock. For setup and self-hosting, see

what.a: Open Mock is a free, open-source mockup generator for creating realistic fake chat screenshots, social posts, AI conversations, stories, and emails across 49 platforms.

free.a: Yes. All features are free with no signup, no watermarks, and no limits. The source code is available under the MIT license.

privacy.a: Yes. Everything runs client-side in your browser. No messages or content are sent to any server. State is optionally saved to localStorage on your device.

platforms.a: All {count} generators including WhatsApp, iMessage, Discord, Slack, ChatGPT, Claude, Instagram, X, Gmail, and more. See the homepage for the full list.

export.a: Click the Export button on any generator page. Choose PNG (1x–3x resolution) or video (chat/AI generators). Transparent background is supported.

uses.a: UI/UX design, app demos, presentations, film/TV production, educational content, and testing layouts. Do not use for deception, fraud, or harassment.

download.q: Do I need to download software?
download.a: No. Open Mock runs in your browser. You can also self-host by cloning the GitHub repository.

contribute.a: Fork the repository, add a new platform following CONTRIBUTING.md, and submit a pull request.

affiliation.q: Is Open Mock affiliated with WhatsApp, Apple, etc.?
affiliation.a: No. Open Mock is an independent open-source project. Platform names and UIs are used for mockup purposes only.

selfHost.a: Yes. Deploy to Vercel, run with npm, or use Docker. See the Docs page for instructions.

seo.chatDescription: Create realistic fake {name} chat screenshots. Direct and group chats with avatars, timestamps, and export to PNG.
seo.aiTitle: Fake {name} Chat Mockup Generator | Open Mock

seo.postDescription: Create realistic fake {name} post screenshots with likes, comments, and media.
seo.commentTitle: Fake {name} Comment Mockup Generator | Open Mock
seo.commentDescription: Create realistic fake {name} comment thread screenshots.
seo.storyTitle: Fake {name} Story Mockup Generator | Open Mock
seo.emailTitle: Fake {name} Email Mockup Generator | Open Mock
